entity.summary: Community-owned concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange on Evmos with historical trading volume and fee generation but zero current TVL in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Forge as a community-owned Evmos CLMM DEX and reports zero current TVL alongside cumulative DEX volume and fee history. No terminal shutdown evidence was recovered, so HEI uses limited rather than dead. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Forge DEX project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Forge metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Forge as a community-owned Evmos concentrated-liquidity DEX and reports zero current TVL with substantial cumulative DEX volume and fee history, supporting conservative limited classification.

evidence.title: Forge DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Forge as an Evmos decentralized exchange.
